title: ContractCapability
description: Locality and safety flags that describe where and how a contract resource can be served.

worker_backed.description: True when the response is served by the Cloudflare Worker (durable, remotely accessible).

local_only.description: True when the resource can only be produced in a local runtime environment.

remote_safe.description: True when the resource is safe to call over the public internet without a tunnel.

tunnel_required.description: True when a tunnel (e.g. Cloudflare Tunnel) is required to reach the backing service.

unavailable_on_surface.description: True when this resource cannot be served on the current surface at all.
